description_long: This is a three-tiered, open-frame bookcase with a minimalist, industrial design. The structure consists of four slender vertical metal rods supporting three rectangular, flat shelves, which appear to be made of a dark, possibly metal or composite material. The shelves are evenly spaced and lack any backing or side panels, giving the bookcase an airy, open appearance. The legs are capped with small feet, likely for stability on flat surfaces. There are no visible handles, doors, or decorative elements, emphasizing its utilitarian function. The overall look is sleek and modern, suitable for urban environments such as lofts, offices, or garages.
description: A minimalist, industrial-style bookcase with three open shelves and a sturdy metal frame. Its dark finish and open design make it suitable for modern urban spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing three evenly spaced shelves and the open, rectangular frame.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile and the depth of the shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view, similar to the front, with clear visibility of the shelf structure and frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and shelf depth.
